events.operator_statement_summary: After the exact RC5 DFU download/read-back and linked USB/reset runs, the operator confirmed a complete power-off interval of at least five seconds and a normal boot before this fresh all-14 capture.
The unit was switched fully off for at least five seconds and booted normally before the untouched-official all-14 capture.

limitations: Power removal is operator-attested because the serial capture cannot sense supply voltage.

The candidate flash/read-back record and capture share the admitted USB path and are ordered in the same qualification session; the self-test runner itself records version and USB identity but does not perform DFU read-back.
The historical official reference is exact-version-bound and was not retroactively DFU-read-back-bound.
